decisions.rationale: Valid scope gap: ai_RNbBHWau group marker exists in Header.tsx but marketing links are empty and Index.tsx still uses a bespoke header. All three ACs pass (AC-1 names brand, logged-in nav, and actions regions only). Coverage preflight already documents deferral of logged-out nav content to Index/SHELL-04. SHELL-04 depends on SHELL-03 for header-actions wiring (login/signup triggers ai_RNbBHWbF/bG) and is the correct wave to mount shared Header on Index and populate marketing links; does not block SHELL-04 gate.

Logged-in header nav (ai_RNbBHWaz) hidden below md is an intentional responsive deviation: SHELL-02 sidebar provides equivalent mobile primary navigation. Not required by AC-2 (route parity only). Medium-priority ui-fidelity polish; downstream items depending on SHELL-03 need composable Header mounted and nav routes, both satisfied. Document as accepted SPA pattern unless Bubble parity audit demands change in a later polish pass.

IR lists sibling logout button ai_RNbBHWbI under header-actions alongside avatar ai_RNbBHWbH, but AC-3 explicitly requires logout via dropdown control ai_RNbBHWbO wired to Supabase signOut — which is implemented and passes FV-3. Standalone quick-logout is low-priority ui_ref fidelity beyond AC scope; no downstream item in depends_on requires ai_RNbBHWbI specifically.

Coverage artifact hygiene only: preflight.gaps still lists pre-implementation deficiencies despite 100% criteria pass, and files_changed already includes frontend/src/lib/enums/index.ts in the current coverage JSON. Refresh preflight on next implement or review pass; does not affect functional implementation or block advance.

summary: Review ok (coverage 100%, no blockers); all ACs and functional checks pass. 0 fix_now, 4 defer, 0 accept. Logged-out marketing nav and Index Header reuse deferred to SHELL-04; mobile nav parity deferred (sidebar covers). Standalone logout button ai_RNbBHWbI and coverage preflight refresh recorded as backlog polish. Advance implement gate.
